title: Peruvian Ceviche Recipe
description: A refreshing and zesty Peruvian-inspired ceviche dish made with raw fish marinated in citrus juices. Perfect for a light and flavorful meal.
instructions: Cut the halibut into small pieces and place in a large bowl.
In a small bowl, mix together lime juice, lemon juice, aji amarillo pepper, and salt.
Pour the marinade over the halibut and mix well to coat.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the fish to marinate.
Just before serving, stir in the chopped cilantro.
Taste and adjust the seasoning with black pepper as needed.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
